ui.start: 🔮 Numerology Matrix A complete personality reading based on your date of birth: character and strengths, financial code, favorable and critical days, a 5-year forecast, and your personal year and month numbers. Order your reading, complete payment, and fill in a short questionnaire. Your finished report will arrive as a PDF file.
ui.help: How it works 1. Tap “Order a reading” and choose a service. 2. Pay for the selected service. 3. Questionnaire: full name and date of birth. 4. Your finished report as a PDF. To stop the questionnaire: /cancel. Past reports: “My readings”.
ui.lang_title: Выберите язык / Тілді таңдаңыз / Choose language:
ui.ask_daily_birth:
📅 Daily forecast.
Enter your date of birth in DD.MM.YYYY format
For example: 14.03.1992
ui.ask_daily_target:
Which date should the forecast be for?
Enter a date (DD.MM.YYYY) or tap “Today”.
ui.ask_birth_date:
Step 4. Date of birth in DD.MM.YYYY format.
For example: 14.03.1992
ui.ask_gender: Your gender — it’s needed to correctly calculate your Name Number:
ui.ask_maiden_name:
Maiden name (before marriage) — to calculate your maiden name number.
If your name hasn’t changed, tap “Skip”.
ui.ask_mother_bd:
Mother’s date of birth in DD.MM.YYYY format — to calculate Karmic Events.
If you don’t know it, tap “Skip”.
ui.ask_father_bd:
Father’s date of birth in DD.MM.YYYY format — to calculate Karmic Events.
If you don’t know it, tap “Skip”.
ui.pay_success:
Payment received ✅
Now just fill in the questionnaire — it only takes a minute.
ui.pay_success_imitation:
✅ Payment completed (test mode).
Now just fill in the questionnaire — it only takes a minute.
ui.pay_success_manual:
Payment received ✅
This reading is prepared individually — the specialist will contact you here in Telegram, confirm your details and send the result manually (usually within a day). Thank you!
ui.survey_cancelled: Questionnaire cancelled. Your payment is saved: you can return to it anytime from “My readings”.
ui.no_results:
Your reports will appear here.
To order your first one, tap “Order a reading”.
ui.calc_error:
We couldn’t put your report together — a technical hiccup. Your payment is saved.
Tap “All correct” again or send /cancel.
ui.deliver_error: Your report is ready, but we couldn’t send it right now. It’s saved — open it in the “My readings” section.
ui.delivered:
Done ✨
Your report is saved; you can open it again in “My readings”.
sec.monthly_energy: ENERGY CHART FOR THE CURRENT YEAR (by month)
sec.monthly_energy_pdf: Energy chart for the current year
sec.moon_sun_years: MOON AND SUN BY MONTH (by year)
sec.moon_sun_years_pdf: Moon and Sun by month · by year
sec.personal_numbers: PERSONAL MONTH AND DAY NUMBERS (as of the report date)
sec.personal_numbers_pdf: Personal Month and Day Numbers · as of the report date
txt.thousand_teacher: Master Achiever Code — a teacher, an example for others. The downside: pride.
txt.thousand_creativity: Master Achiever Code — recognition through creativity. The downside: pride.
txt.thousand_history: Master Achiever Code — destined to leave a mark on history through creativity. The downside: pride.
txt.thousand_teacher_history: Master Achiever Code — a teacher, destined to leave a mark on history and become an example for others. The downside: pride.
txt.consciousness_lt20: Your main focus should be on developing your personality, strengthening your will, and refining body and soul. Earthly matters await you, not higher realms.
txt.consciousness_lt30: You need to work through your earthly karma, drawing on your roots and the experience of your ancestors. Develop your intuition and learn to govern your subconscious.
txt.consciousness_lt40: Such people know how to influence the minds of those around them. Their calling is to teach others a philosophical view of life and reality. So you must study a great deal to gain enough knowledge to teach others.
txt.consciousness_lt50: The highest Level of Consciousness. An intellectual, philosopher, and teacher. Strive to perceive the higher purpose of the surrounding reality and the laws of the universe.
txt.consciousness_observer: This is an Observer, an intermediary between God and people. A bearer of secret knowledge.
daily.title: DAILY FORECAST
ui.catalog_empty: The catalog is empty for now
ui.manual_at_master: This reading is prepared by a master
svc.forecast_1y.title: 1-Year Forecast
svc.forecast_1y.desc: A forecast for the year ahead: your Life Path Number and Life Code, behavior code, Moon and Sun month by month, Personal Month and Personal Day numbers, your Personal Year Number, energy potential (decline/rise), and an energy chart with biorhythms for the year.
svc.forecast_5y.title: 5-Year Forecast
svc.forecast_5y.desc: Everything in the yearly forecast, plus five-year dynamics year by year: fateful events, a life-force chart, and your favorable, critical, and accident-prone days across 5 years.
svc.matrix_mini.title: Mini Matrix Reading
svc.matrix_mini.desc: A complete description of your Psychomatrix, Life Path Number, Personal Year Number, behavior code, level of consciousness, and your favorable, critical, and accident-prone days.
svc.matrix_full.title: Full Matrix Reading
svc.matrix_full.desc: A complete personal reading: Psychomatrix, encoding and Life Code, Life Path Number, Soul Number, behavior code, level of consciousness, Personal Year Number, a year-by-year life-force chart, energy chart, fateful events, financial luck code, and your favorable, critical, and accident-prone days.
svc.finance_1y.title: 1-Year Financial Forecast
svc.finance_1y.desc: Your financial luck code, a month-by-month forecast with descriptions, and an energy chart for the current year. Please be sure to provide your parents' names and years of birth.
svc.children.title: Children's Matrices (Reading)
svc.children.desc: A children's reading: Psychomatrix, encodings, Life Code and Soul Number, lucky numbers, life forces, age of risk, the karma of the name, level of consciousness, and biorhythms. Prepared by hand by a master — once your order is placed, you will be directed to a specialist.
svc.compatibility.title: Compatibility
svc.compatibility.desc: A compatibility reading for two people based on their dates of birth. Prepared by hand by a master — once your order is placed, you will be directed to a specialist.
val.date_format: The date must be in DD.MM.YYYY format, for example {example}
val.date_invalid: That date doesn't exist. Please check the day and month.
val.birth_year_min: The year of birth must not be earlier than 1900.
val.birth_future: The date of birth cannot be in the future.
val.year_range: The year must be in the range 1900–2100.
val.name_alpha: {field}: only letters, hyphens, and spaces are allowed.
ui.ton_invoice:
Invoice for {amount} {fiat} (payable in TON at current rate).
Tap «Pay with TON», complete the payment in your wallet, then «Check payment».
ui.ton_not_paid: Payment hasn't arrived yet. Complete the payment and tap «Check payment» again.
ui.ton_invoice_error: Couldn't create the payment invoice. Please try again later.
ui.ton_expired: Invoice not found or expired. Please place your order again.
